title: Memory, Context Windows, Compaction, and Retrieval · Failure Case: Durable Memory
summary: Keep a long-running agent grounded without unlimited history. Planned artifact: Add and verify the loops durable memory increment in a context and durable-memory policy. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Store stable facts with provenance, scope, freshness, and deletion rules.
Keep only current decision-relevant state in working context.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.
